phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è l'ingresso alla spiaggia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so al-lah spyad-jah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per il mare.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL MAH-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the sea.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the sea.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EEL MAH-reh
responses.local: Segua le indicazioni per il mare.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un lettino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAHN-toh COS-tah oon let-TEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiudete, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-rah kyoo-DEH-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si noleggia un ombrellone, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KOH-meh see noh-LEHD-jah oon om-brel-LOH-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Parli con il personale in cabina.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAHR-lee KOHN EEL pehr-soh-NAH-leh EEN kah-BEE-nah
likely_response.translation_en: Speak with the staff in the cabin.

responses.english: Speak with the staff in the cabin.
responses.phonetic: PAHR-lee KOHN EEL pehr-soh-NAH-leh EEN kah-BEE-nah
responses.local: Parli con il personale in cabina.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, siete aperti oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, syeh-teh ah-PEHR-tee OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh
